rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PAULA BENNETT AS TRUSTEE OF THE HAGAN FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. Before the Court is attorney Brad C. Brereton's unopposed Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel - Civil. The statutory requirements for a motion to be relieved as counsel can be found in CCP Sections 284 and 285 and CRC 3.1362. Brereton's motion does not fully comply with all the statutory requirements including: (1) an explanation why a motion under CCP Section 284(2) was brought instead of filing a consent under CCP Section 284(1) as required by CRC 3.1362(c); (2) a declaration stating facts showing the accuracy of the mailing addresses as required by CRC 3.1362(d); and (3) delivering courtesy copies of the proposed order (Order Granting Attorney's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel-Civil (form MC-053)) to Room 202, attention Probate Law and Motion as required by CRC 3.1362(e) and Local Rules 14.7 and 14.10. The Court continues Brereton's motion to April 11, 2022, at 9:00 a.m. to allow Brereton to comply with all statutory requirements.
